---
title: "Regional Development"
subtitle: "Theories, strategies, and spatial patterns of regional planning and development."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Regional Development** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course examines the theories and practices of regional planning and development — addressing spatial inequalities, planning strategies, and the quest for balanced territorial development.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Typology of Regions, Formal and Fictional Regions.**
* **World Regional Disparities.**
* **Theories of Regional Development (Albert O. Hirschman, Gunnar Myrdal, John Friedman), Dependency theory of Underdevelopment.**
* **Global Economic Blocks.**
* **Regional Development and Social Movements in India.**

---

{{< include regional-development/concept-of-a-region.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/types-of-regions-and-methods-of-regionalisation.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/growth-centres-and-growth-poles.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/regional-imbalances.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/regional-development-strategies.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/environmental-issues-in-regional-planning.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/planning-for-sustainable-development.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/experience-of-regional-planning-in-india.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/five-year-plans.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/integrated-rural-development-programmes.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/panchayati-raj-and-decentralised-planning.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/command-area-development.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/watershed-management.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/planning-for-backward-area-desert-drought-prone-hill-tribal-area-development.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/multi-level-planning.md >}}

{{< include regional-development/regional-planning-and-development-of-island-territories.md >}}
